text.title: Sprint Capacity From Complexity Tags Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: compute-weights
step.action: For each tag, compute mean slots consumed.

step.name: size-capacity
step.action: Compute total slot budget per sprint.

step.name: wire-overflow-block
step.action: Add overflow rule that refuses sprints whose sum > capacity.
